---
title: "Model Fitting"
author: Apurva Nakade
date: 2026-07-17
listing:
  contents: "/*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---

<!--
Copyright (c) 2026 Apurva Nakade. All rights reserved.
Released under Apache 2.0 license as described in the file LICENSE.
Authors: Apurva Nakade
-->

Model fitting chooses parameters so a model matches observed data as closely as possible. The apps below explore how model complexity trades off against stability: a model with more free parameters can always fit the data at least as well, but it can also become far more sensitive to the data's noise.
